sections.heading: Essential Eight explained
sections.title: Essential Eight cybersecurity mitigation strategies for organizations
sections.summary: The Essential Eight are prioritized cyber security mitigation strategies developed by the Australian Signals Directorate (ASD) to protect organizations' internet-connected information technology networks. These strategies include patching applications and operating systems, implementing multi-factor authentication, restricting administrative privileges, applying application controls, limiting Microsoft Office macros, hardening user applications, and maintaining regular backups. The strategies are designed specifically for standard IT networks and not for enterprise mobility or operational technology environments where alternative approaches may be more appropriate.
sections.dtia_summary: These eight specific technical controls are critical for DTIAs as they define baseline security requirements that must be implemented when transferring or processing data across borders to ensure adequate protection against cyber threats.
sections.source_quote: The Essential Eight mitigation strategies are: patch applications, patch operating systems, multi-factor authentication, restrict administrative privileges, application control, restrict Microsoft Office macros, user application hardening, regular backups.

sections.heading: Essential Eight explained
sections.title: Essential Eight implementation assessment process
sections.summary: Organizations must use the Essential Eight assessment process guide to evaluate their implementation of the mitigation strategies. This assessment process is part of the maturity model that supports the implementation of the Essential Eight, ensuring organizations meet the required security standards for their information technology networks.
sections.dtia_summary: The assessment process ensures that data transfers and processing activities comply with the Essential Eight security requirements, which is critical for DTIAs involving cross-border data flows.

requirements.text: Conduct assessments against the Essential Eight using the Essential Eight assessment process guide

sections.source_quote: Assessments against the Essential Eight should be conducted using the Essential Eight assessment process guide.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.title: Disclaimer and copyright information for Essential Eight guide
sections.summary: This section provides a disclaimer stating that the guide is of general nature and not legal advice, and that the Commonwealth accepts no responsibility for damages resulting from reliance on the information. It also includes copyright details and Creative Commons licensing terms for the publication.
sections.source_quote: The material in this guide is of a general nature and should not be regarded as legal advice or relied on for assistance in any particular circumstance or emergency situation.
